title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called the Weapons of Mass Destruction and their Delivery Systems (Prohibition of Unlawful Activities) Act, 2005. (2) It shall come into force on such date 1 as the Central Government may, by notification in the Official Gazette, appoint.
footnote: 1 17th November, 2006, vide notification No. S.O. 1990(E), dated 17th November, 2006, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(ii).
